version_description: Tried to write a chords version that has the proper arrangement noted, proper metadata, chord inversions, etc.

versions.version_description: This version is complete with chords and lyrics and includes the full chords for the bridge section.
Full lyrics with chords optimized for keyboard. For letter size printing, use -1 font size in UG print dialog.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Huey Lewis & the News - "The Power of Love"


[intro]

[ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  x3

[ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch] x2

[Verse]
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
The power of love...is a curious thing[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
make a one man weep,    make another man sing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Change a hawk to a little white dove[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
more than a feeling    that's the power of love[/tab]

[interlude]
[ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Tougher than diamonds,  bricks like cream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Stronger and harder than a bad girl's dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
   make a bad one good make a wrong one right[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
   power of love that will you home at night[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C/E[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]
 You don't need money,  don't take fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C/E[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]
 Don't need no credit card to ride this train[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C/E[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G/A[/ch]
It's strong and it's sudden and it's cruel sometimes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Gsus4[/ch]
but it might just save your life[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
 That's the power of love[/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
        That's the power of love[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
First time you feel it, it might make you sad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Next time you feel it it might make you mad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
But you'll be glad baby when you've found[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
That's the power makes the world go'round[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]C/E[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]
 And it don't take money,  don't take fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C/E[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]
 Don't need no credit card to ride this train[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C/E[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G/A[/ch]
It's strong and it's sudden and it's cruel sometimes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
but it might just save your life[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]G7[/ch]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]
  They say that all in love is fair[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Cm7/F[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
yeah, but you don't care[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
  But you know what to do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
   when it gets hold of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Gsus4[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] 
  and with a little help from above[/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab]                 [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
 you feel the power of love  you feel the power of love[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
 Can you feel it?     hmmmm...[/tab]


[solo]
[ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] x 8


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]
 It don't take money,  don't take fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C/E[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]
 Don't need no credit card to ride this train[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C/E[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]
Tougher than diamonds and stronger than steel[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]C/E[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]
 you won't feel nothin' till you feel[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]
 you feel the power, just the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C/E[/ch]
 That's the power, that's the power of  love[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]
 You feel the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
         you feel the power of love                    (repeat and fade)[/tab]
